stemHtml: If a pilot holds a type rating for a complex multi-engine aircraft, what is the period of its validity and for which aircraft is it valid for?

options.a: 1 year, for this aircraft type only.
options.b: 1 year, for this aircraft type and it is also valid for non-complex aircraft.
options.c: 2 years, for this aircraft type only.
options.d: 2 years, for this aircraft type and it is also valid for non-complex aircraft.
